raw.message:
LINEレンジャー×デッドアカウントのスペシャルイベントを無料で楽しもう✨
今ならログインするだけで漆栖川希詠のレンジャーがもらえる！

hook.summary: Introduction of chibi-style collaboration characters from the 'Dead Account' series.
hook.visual_action: A blue-haired character stands center-frame before transitioning to a group shot of five collaboration units against a stylized city backdrop.
hook.text_overlay: コラボ限定レンジャーと バトルを楽しもう！

scene_flow: Introduction of the main collaboration character in a stylized chibi art style.
Display of the full roster of five collaboration characters available in the event.
In-game battle footage featuring the collaboration characters using their special abilities.
Final call-to-action screen with the collaboration logo and 'Play Now' button.
on_screen_text: コラボ限定レンジャーと
LINE レンジャー x デッドアカウント
audience_proxy: Japanese fans of the Dead Account manga and casual mobile gamers who enjoy character collection RPGs.
